title: polypodium × huancayanum
intro: Polypodium × huancayanum, also known as the Huancayo fern, is a hybrid plant species within the Polypodium genus, specifically a cross between Polypodium pellucidum and Polypodium strictum. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in South America, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Polypodium × huancayanum include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and help to lower blood pressure. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions with other medications.
